data.name: Application Development
content: Interested in building applications that are useful, maintainable, and thoughtful in both UX and structure.
Comfortable moving from interface work into application logic and implementation details.
I treat development as engineering work, not just visual assembly.

data.name: Backend & APIs
content: Interested in backend systems, business logic, authentication flows, and service-to-service thinking.
Comfortable reasoning about APIs, data flow, and the operational side of application architecture.
I enjoy turning product requirements into structured backend behavior.

data.name: DevOps & Automation
content: Building repeatable workflows for delivery, system administration, and infrastructure setup.
Interested in CI/CD, platform reliability, and reducing manual operational work.
Approach DevOps as a discipline that should improve both speed and system safety.

data.name: Security Engineering
content: Strong security foundations still shape how I think about software, infrastructure, and deployment choices.
Comfortable analyzing risk, identifying weak points, and improving systems with secure-by-default thinking.
I see security as part of product and platform quality, not as a separate afterthought.

data.name: Infrastructure & Cloud
content: Comfortable working in Linux environments, virtualized setups, and container-driven workflows.
Interested in infrastructure that is observable, reproducible, and easier to operate over time.
I enjoy the layer where development, deployment, and platform reliability meet.
